workflow.trigger: sheep-ovary context plus a readable full-feature Seurat RDS
workflow.banksy_role: optional spatial clustering adapter or corroborating view
workflow.scanpy_role: fallback for AnnData-first inputs or an independent corroborating analysis
workflow.resolution_rule: adaptive; select the candidate with the best integrated evidence for the biological question, preserving stable lineages/subtypes before avoiding state/technical fragmentation; lower complexity is only a tie-breaker

cohort_reclustering_contract.rule: use the same normal candidate range for every sheep-ovary broad-class or targeted cohort; adapt the selected resolution, PCs and k within current-cohort evidence, never recluster final QC, and never lower resolution to compensate for a defective graph

trigger_all: R object inspection reports a Seurat object
Spatial assay is present with at least 10000 features
conversion manifest explicitly verifies a same-batch StereoPy cellbin_PPed conversion
counts/data layers, marker coverage and cell-coordinate identity audits pass
stereopy_cellbin_pped_contract.exception_policy: a numerical deviation requires an explicit batch-exception flag and a substantive recorded rationale; biological resolution selection remains adaptive

release_policy.maximum_default_depth: broad plus one independently supported functional subtype
release_policy.quality_reference_semantics: compare biological evidence quality with the validated deidentified R-first case; do not require matching labels or subtype depth
release_policy.oocyte_rule: send the complete multi-module starting candidate cohort to adaptive query-only reclustering; use strict marker/anti-program seeds and spatial foci as support rather than a membership filter; release only non-ZP/maternal-enriched, somatic-cleared, morphology-compatible cluster(s) and return somatic neighbours directly to supported lineages with ambient tags
release_policy.neural_candidate_rule: SOX10/S100B/PLP1/MPZ-like glial backbone or a coherent neuronal program plus track-like morphology; DLG2 or another single neuronal gene is insufficient. Candidate discovery is required even when the reference case lacked this class.
